details.failingMessage: Safe validation capture was attempted on this host, but the stored Shopify conformance access token is invalid and refresh failed: This request requires an active refresh_token.

notes: Planned happy-path draft order update parity. The proxy request updates a staged draft order's email, note, tags, shipping line, and line items, then expects downstream `draftOrder(id:)` replay to reflect the staged mutation without sending the supported mutation upstream. Safe missing-variable validation is covered locally until live capture auth is repaired.
